# Resource Management Plan

## Purpose
Plan how resources are estimated, acquired, developed, and monitored across the project.

## Audience
Resource Manager, Project Manager, Delivery Leads, HR Partners.

## Inputs
- Schedule baseline (`docs/methodology/waterfall/templates/schedule-baseline.xlsx`).
- Resource assignment matrix (`docs/templates/shared/resource-assignment-matrix.csv`).

## 1. Organisational Chart / Resource Breakdown Structure
Provide a high-level org chart or resource breakdown structure (RBS).

## 2. Roles & Responsibilities
| Role | Responsibilities | Allocation % |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |

## 3. Resource Estimation
Describe estimation approach, assumptions, and sizing techniques.

## 4. Skills Matrix
| Role/Skill | Required Level | Current Coverage | Gap Actions |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 5. Resource Acquisition Strategy
Describe staffing sources, timing, and approvals.

## 6. Training & Development
List required training, certifications, and onboarding plans.

## 7. Resource Calendars & Time Off
Define holidays, planned leave, and non-working days.

## 8. Resource Monitoring & Control
Describe capacity tracking, utilization reporting, and adjustment triggers.

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Resource roles, skills, and allocation needs defined.
- [ ] Acquisition strategy and training plan agreed.
- [ ] Monitoring cadence established.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Resource plan supports delivery milestones and quality requirements.
- Staffing gaps and mitigation actions are documented.
